data.title: 70 Economists Urge EU to Launch Public Digital Euro Over Private Stablecoins
data.description:

data.title: Ukraine officially limits Polymarket access
data.description:
Ukraine has officially limited access to Polymarket, citing the platform’s lack of a required license for activities classified as gambling. The decision to block was made by the National Commission for State Regulation of Electronic Communications (NCEC) based on Resolution No. 695. The ban on Polymarket in Ukraine followed a two-step regulatory process. On November […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ukraine-officially-limits-polymarket-access/
